name: Maya Torres — The Freelance Brand Builder
summary: A freelance brand designer running a solo practice (company size: 1) in the design services industry. Maya's business runs on client billable hours, so every minute saved in production or client review is direct profit. She actively seeks white-labeling and professional presentation features to maintain her brand credibility with clients.
goals: Save 10+ minutes per project through faster templating and streamlined asset export
Create a polished client share view that reflects her own brand, not the tool's branding
Build reusable brand kits for each client to maintain consistency across deliverables
Manage comment threads with clients directly in the platform to avoid back-and-forth emails
pains: Client share view currently shows tool branding, undermining her professional image
Asset export workflow adds unnecessary steps to every project delivery
motivations: Every minute saved is money earned — billing hourly makes efficiency directly profitable
Presenting a seamless branded experience to clients justifies premium rates
objections: Not paying for a platform that still shows its own logo in client-facing views
channels: Brand kit and asset library pages
decision_triggers: Sees white-label client share demo that removes platform branding entirely
Calculates 10+ minutes saved per project multiplied across monthly client volume
Peer designer recommendation highlighting client-facing professionalism
sample_quotes: I bill clients hourly so anything that saves me 10 minutes per project is worth real money. Can your client share view be white-labeled?
My clients shouldn't see what tool I'm using — they should just see my brand.
I need brand kits that actually persist so I'm not rebuilding from scratch each time.

journey_stages.mindset: Evaluating whether the tool will save enough time to justify the cost
Building first client project; testing professional delivery features

source_evidence.claim: Freelance Brand Designer, solo practice in design services
Client share view needs white-labeling to protect professional brand
Asset export workflow adds steps to client delivery
Save 10+ minutes per project through efficiency gains
Create polished client share view with own branding
Build reusable brand kits for client consistency
Manage comment threads with clients in platform
Billing hourly makes every minute saved directly profitable
Branded experience justifies premium rates — seeks white-label
Not paying for platform that shows its own logo in client views
